prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Gas piping, part of the Piping & Plumbing scope. The observed field condition is: wrong thread sealant (not gas-rated). The work is staged — materials, tools, and access are ready, but work has not begun. Reference material on hand: IFGC, NFPA 54.
title: Tool and material selection: Gas piping (residential job)
